command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "########## SAKURA LIVE CAPTURE ARMED — 90 second window ##########"
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
echo "baseline log lines: $LB"

# HOP 4 packet capture: capture POST packets arriving on 8080 from the tunnel
sudo timeout 92 tcpdump -i any -n -A -s 0 'tcp port 8080 and tcp[((tcp[12:1] & 0xf0) >> 2):4] = 0x504f5354' 2>/dev/null > /tmp/sakura_cap.txt &
TCPD=$!

echo ">>> SEND YOUR MESSAGE NOW <<<"
echo ""

# Watch gateway.log for 90s, reporting each hop as it happens
for i in $(seq 1 18); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null)
  INBOUND=$(echo "$NEW" | grep "inbound message" | tail -1)
  RESPONSE=$(echo "$NEW" | grep "response ready" | tail -1)
  SKIP=$(echo "$NEW" | grep -iE "skip|require.?mention|not mentioned|ignored" | tail -1)
  if [ -n "$INBOUND" ]; then echo "[+$((i*5))s] HOP4 RECEIVED: $INBOUND"; fi
  if [ -n "$SKIP" ]; then echo "[+$((i*5))s] HOP4 DECISION: $SKIP"; fi
  if [ -n "$RESPONSE" ]; then echo "[+$((i*5))s] HOP5-7 REPLIED: $RESPONSE"; fi
done

wait $TCPD 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== HOP 4 PACKET EVIDENCE (did the POST physically arrive at 8080?) ==="
grep -iE "POST /telegram|x-telegram-bot-api-secret|cf-connecting|host:" /tmp/sakura_cap.txt 2>/dev/null | head -8
echo "packet lines captured: $(wc -l < /tmp/sakura_cap.txt 2>/dev/null)"

echo ""
echo "=== FULL new gateway.log this window ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20

echo ""
echo "=== Telegram delivery confirmation (post-test) ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print('pending:', d.get('pending_update_count'), '| last_error:', repr(d.get('last_error_message')), '| last_error_date:', d.get('last_error_date'))"

sudo rm -f /tmp/sakura_cap.txt
REMOTE
